description: IDT Beyond provides APIs for mobile airtime top-up, prepaid product distribution, account balance, product catalogs, number validation, and related reporting. Its public developer footprint appears to center on a single versioned HTTPS JSON API.
summary: IDT Beyond exposes one documented REST API at `https://api.idtbeyond.com/v1`, described by an OpenAPI spec, and authenticated with an App ID plus App Key header pair.
